Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
Parking lot, 4325 NE Marine Dr, Portland, OR 97211, USA
Blackberries a plenty just on the sandy hill as you walk down Broughton beach. Access: Public.

[Evergreen Blvd between E 5th and Andresen (in Vancouver)] Lots of blackberries all along the north side of Evergreen Blvd. They're probably sprayed by the city, but they look great and they're ripe now. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: August-September.
Both sides of the road on 5th from Blandford Dr. all the way to Grand Blvd. You can smell the ripe blackberries before you even get there. Access: Public.
2409 E Mill Plain Blvd, Vancouver, WA 98661, USA
Right along the sidewalk up against a fence. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: July-August.
Lots of blackberry bushes here, good in late summer.

Italian prune-plums on an old tree in someone's side yard. It's private property, but within a few feet of the street and most rot on the ground, so I think it's okay to take the windfall. Access: Private. Falling Fruit season: July-July.
